All evidence collected. Here is the full report.

---

## Codebase Investigation Report

**Scope:** Delta comparison between `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/` (source) and `.opencode/skills/` (deployed)  
**Question:** Are deployed skills in sync with the refactored source?  
**Git context:** Branch `v2.9.5-detox-dev`, ahead of origin by 2 commits, all changes unstaged

---

### Delta Table

| # | Skill Name | In Source | In Deployed | SKILL.md Match | Notes |
|---|-----------|-----------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| 1 | `hivemind-atomic-commit` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 8,741 bytes, md5 `3c6eaf0d` |
| 2 | `hivemind-codemap` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 9,388 bytes, md5 `7f4771df` |
| 3 | `hivemind-gatekeeping` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 13,756 bytes, md5 `f1bedb9a` |
| 4 | `hivemind-patterns` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 9,207 bytes, md5 `edaf32af` |
| 5 | `hivemind-refactor` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 13,314 bytes, md5 `3d476d29` |
| 6 | `hivemind-spec-driven` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 9,473 bytes, md5 `63fb512a` |
| 7 | `hivemind-system-debug` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 3,785 bytes, md5 `6cdb2101` |
| 8 | `use-hivemind` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 21,702 bytes, md5 `40cb1225` |
| 9 | `use-hivemind-context` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 16,581 bytes, md5 `fcf6a484` |
| 10 | `use-hivemind-delegation` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 24,366 bytes, md5 `07b19ebd` |
| 11 | `use-hivemind-git-memory` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 8,270 bytes, md5 `6bd031c9` |
| 12 | `use-hivemind-planning` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 14,965 bytes, md5 `16422815` |
| 13 | `use-hivemind-research` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 5,034 bytes, md5 `d3f4f705` |
| 14 | `use-hivemind-skill-authoring` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 8,288 bytes, md5 `b3f4e6b7` |
| 15 | `use-hivemind-tdd` | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ | ‚úÖ IDENTICAL | 13,635 bytes, md5 `7ce39b68` |
| 16 | `hiveminder-operation-guidelines` | ‚úÖ (`.md` file) | ‚ùå NOT DEPLOYED | N/A | See findings below |

---

### Key Findings

#### 1. All 15 skill directories: byte-identical sync

Every SKILL.md, every `references/` subfile, every `tests/` subfile, and every `templates/` subfile is **byte-for-byte identical** between source and deployed. Zero content drift. Zero file-tree differences.

#### 2. `hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md` ‚Äî ORPHAN, NOT DEPLOYED

- **Source location:** `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md` (8,006 bytes, last modified Mar 28 06:56)
- **Deployed:** Does NOT exist in `.opencode/skills/` ‚Äî no `.md` file at the root of the deployed directory, no `hiveminder-operation-guidelines/` directory either
- **Git status:** Listed as **untracked** in source (never committed)
- **Assessment:** This is a loose markdown file in the source staging area that was never promoted to a proper skill directory (no `SKILL.md` wrapper) and never copied to deployment. It is an **orphan artifact**.

#### 3. Additional untracked files in source (not yet committed)

These exist in source but have **not** been committed to git:

| File | Location |
|------|----------|
| `evidence-based-gatekeeping.md` | `hivemind-gatekeeping/references/` |
| `multi-wave-dispatch.md` | `use-hivemind-delegation/references/` |
| `orchestrator-mandate.md` | `use-hivemind/references/` |
| `hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md` | root of `refactored-skills/` |

All three reference files ARE deployed to `.opencode/skills/` (they appear as untracked there too), but the guidelines file is NOT deployed.

#### 4. Git status ‚Äî everything is unstaged

Both source and deployed have **zero staged changes**. All modified files (SKILL.md files, references, tests, templates) are in the working tree only. The branch is 2 commits ahead of origin with nothing added to the index.

---

### Structure Map

```
Source (15 dirs + 1 orphan .md):
.developing-skills/refactored-skills/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md  ‚Üê ORPHAN, not deployed, untracked
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-atomic-commit/             ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-codemap/                   ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-gatekeeping/               ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-patterns/                  ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-refactor/                  ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-spec-driven/               ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-system-debug/              ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind/                       ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-context/               ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-delegation/            ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-git-memory/            ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-planning/              ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-research/              ‚úÖ synced
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-skill-authoring/       ‚úÖ synced
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-tdd/                   ‚úÖ synced

Deployed (15 dirs, no orphan):
.opencode/skills/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hivemind-atomic-commit/             ‚úÖ identical
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ... (14 more, all identical)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ use-hivemind-tdd/                   ‚úÖ identical
```

---

### Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Skills in source | 15 directories + 1 orphan `.md` |
| Skills deployed | 15 directories |
| Content drift | **ZERO** ‚Äî all deployed files byte-identical to source |
| Missing from deployed | `hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md` (orphan, not a skill) |
| Git state | All changes unstaged; branch 2 commits ahead of origin |
